understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by placing all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked '+' so that every goal is occupied simultaneously, within the limited step budget per level, and continue until all levels are cleared.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action shifts the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls/level boundaries or other blocking objects; some adjacent objects (e.g., blocks) can be pushed if there is space for them to move with the piece. Levels may contain multiple selectables; CLICK with an exact pixel/grid position matching a selectable switches control to that piece, but clicking empty space or non-selectable objects has no effect. Walls ('#') generally prevent movement/pushing through them, though the 'blocked' hints are only heuristic and an attempted move is needed to confirm actual behavior.
